notes: date parsed, keyword cols coerced to float, pre/post_chatgpt flag added. WARNING: values are batch-normalised 0-100 — not comparable across keywords from different pull batches.

Quarterly cols forward-filled: ['real_gdp', 'labor_productivity']. YoY % change added for: ['computer_systems_design_emp', 'info_sector_employment', 'software_publishers_emp', 'unemployment_bachelors_plus', 'unemployment_rate', 'info_sector_weekly_earnings']. covid_period flag: 2020-03 to 2021-12. pre/post_chatgpt flag added.
Salary parsed to min/max/mid USD. Company rating stripped from name. Founded -1 → NaN. Size ordinal encoded. Rating -1 → NaN.
YearsCode str→numeric. CompYearly capped at 99th pct. AISelect NaN enforced for pre-2023 rows. Skills exploded to stackoverflow_skills_long.parquet. post_chatgpt flag based on survey_year >= 2023.

Within-title salary capping at 5th–95th pct. 50 titles mapped to ~8 role categories. salary_tier (Low/Mid/High) added within each role_category. All rows are pre-ChatGPT (2020–2022). Used as static salary benchmark — not joined to master_timeline.

Global 95th pct cap on median/mean salary. 50 titles mapped to ~8 role categories. YoY % salary change added per title and per role. Role-level summary saved separately as bls_salary_role_summary.parquet.
FIXED: expanded TITLE_MAP regexes, is_tech_job flag added, ai_skill_score uses unique pattern matching. linkedin_tech_only.parquet = tech/data jobs only.
FIXED: SO ai adoption uses startswith('yes'). LinkedIn uses tech_only subset.

Combined ds_salaries_multiyear (2020-2024) + jobs_in_data (2020-2023). Deduped on title+year+salary. Role mapped to 8 categories. Salary capped at 5th-95th pct per role. Plugs salary trend gap — replaces static BLS 2020-2022 benchmark.
